channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KIRIINDUS] Kiri Industries to Invest Rs. 70 Crore in IndoAsia Agrotech Fertilizers Limited, Acquiring 99.93% Stake
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kiri Industries Ltd. has announced its intention to invest Rs. 70,00,00,000 in IndoAsia Agrotech Fertilizers Limited (IAFL). The investment will be made by subscribing to 7,00,00,000 equity shares of IAFL, which will result in IAFL becoming a subsidiary of Kiri Industries. The investment is a related party transaction, with Manish Kiri and Mrs. Anupama Kiri, Directors of Kiri Industries, being Directors in IAFL. The investment is intended to facilitate IAFL in setting up a manufacturing facility for fertilizers.

  • Kiri Industries to invest Rs. 70 crore in IndoAsia Agrotech Fertilizers Limited
  • Investment will result in Kiri Industries holding 99.93% equity stake in IAFL
  • IAFL is an unlisted public company incorporated in 2024, currently setting up a fertilizer manufacturing facility
  • Manish Kiri and Mrs. Anupama Kiri, Directors of Kiri Industries, are Directors in IAFL
  • Investment intended to facilitate IAFL's manufacturing facility setup

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INTEGHIT] Integrated Hitech Ltd Board Meeting Postponed Due to Non-Availability of Independent Directors
item.description:
The Board Meeting of Integrated Hitech Ltd, originally scheduled for 20th March, 2026 at 05:00 pm, has been deferred/postponed due to the non-availability of Independent Directors. The company will issue a fresh notification regarding the new date and time of the Board Meeting.

  • Integrated Hitech Ltd Board Meeting postponed due to non-availability of Independent Directors
  • The meeting was originally scheduled for 20th March, 2026 at 05:00 pm
  • The company will issue a fresh notification regarding the new date and time of the Board Meeting
  • The decision is in compliance with Regulation 29 and 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTEGRATED HITECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SIMPLEXCAS] Simplex Castings Announces Large Order Wins Worth ₹41.38 Crores from BHEL, ThyssenKrupp, and SMS
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Simplex Castings Limited, a leading precision metallurgy and casting solutions company in India, has announced significant order wins from SMS Group, ThyssenKrupp, and BHEL Varanasi. The combined order value is ₹41.38 crores, elevating the company's order book to ₹61.98 crores in March 2026. These orders are primarily trial or qualification-stage mandates, with Simplex viewing them as a precursor to larger ticket and high margin commitments. The company is uniquely positioned to capture a dominant share of the emerging opportunity set in the steel sector.

  • Simplex Castings won orders worth ₹41.38 crores from SMS Group, ThyssenKrupp, and BHEL Varanasi
  • The orders elevate Simplex Castings' order book to ₹61.98 crores in March 2026
  • These orders are primarily trial or qualification-stage mandates
  • Simplex Castings is well-positioned to capture a dominant share of the emerging opportunity set in the steel sector
  • The company is a leading precision metallurgy and casting solutions company in India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIMPLEX CASTINGS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [TTL] T T Brands Ltd: T T Brands Limited Acquires 0.0512% Shares in T Limited
item.description:
T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group of T T Brands Limited, has disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, the acquisition of 0.0512% shares in T Limited. The acquisition took place from 18.03.2026 to 20.03.2026. The total equity share capital of T Limited before the acquisition was 10,248,000, which increased to 25,83,10,944 after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of T Limited after the acquisition is 25,83,10,944.

  • T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group, acquires 0.0512% shares in T Limited
  • The acquisition took place from 18.03.2026 to 20.03.2026
  • The total equity share capital of T Limited before the acquisition was 10,248,000
  • The total equity share capital of T Limited after the acquisition is 25,83,10,944
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of T Limited after the acquisition is 25,83,10,944

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: T T LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AFIL] Akme Fintrade (India) Limited's EGM Results: All Resolutions Passed
item.description:
Akme Fintrade (India) Limited has announced the results of its Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) held on March 20, 2026. The meeting, held through Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means, transacted resolutions with requisite majority. The resolution to consider and approve the issue of warrants on a preferential cum private placement basis to the persons belonging to the promoter and non-promoter category was passed. The voting results and scrutinizer report are available on the company's website.

  • Akme Fintrade (India) Limited held its EGM on March 20, 2026
  • All resolutions were passed with requisite majority
  • The resolution to issue warrants on a preferential cum private placement basis was approved
  • Voting results and scrutinizer report are available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VINTRON] Reganto Enterprises Ltd Announces Q3 2025 Financial Results with 7658.58 INR Revenue
item.description:
Reganto Enterprises Limited, formerly known as Vintron Informatics Limited, has released its unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and half yearly ended 30.09.2025. The company's total revenue from operations for the quarter is 7658.58 INR, with a net profit of 2241.22 INR for the continuing operations. The total comprehensive income for the period is 4791.79 INR.

  • Revenue from operations for Q3 2025 is 7658.58 INR.
  • Net profit for continuing operations is 2241.22 INR.
  • Total comprehensive income for the period is 4791.79 INR.
  • Paid-up Equity Share Capital stands at 994.36 INR.
  • Basic Earnings Per Share (before extraordinary/exceptional item) is 0.39 INR.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINTRON INFORMATICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SSLFINANCE] Popees Cares Ltd Board Meeting Postponed Due to Non-Availability of Independent Directors
item.description:
Popees Cares Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 29 and 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has announced the postponement of their scheduled Board Meeting. The meeting, initially set for Friday, 20th March, 2026 at 04:30 pm, has been deferred due to the unavailability of Independent Directors. The company will issue a fresh notification regarding the new Board Meeting date in due course.

  • Popees Cares Ltd Board Meeting postponed due to non-availability of Independent Directors.
  • The meeting was initially scheduled for 20th March, 2026 at 04:30 pm.
  • The company will announce a new date for the Board Meeting in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARCHANA SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SMSLIFE] Haleos Labs Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Haleos Labs Ltd, formerly known as SMS Lifesciences India Limited, has announced the closure of the 'Trading Window' for dealing in securities of the company for Designated Persons and specified Connected Persons, including their Immediate relatives, of the Company and Subsidiary of the Company. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board meeting for considering the financial results of the Company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, will be informed separately. This action is in accordance with the 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' of the company.

  • Haleos Labs Ltd announces closure of trading window for Designated Persons and specified Connected Persons.
  • The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with the 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' of the company.
  • The date of the Board meeting for considering the financial results will be informed separately.
  • Haleos Labs Ltd was previously known as SMS Lifesciences India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMS Lifesciences India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SIMPLEXCAS] Simplex Castings Ltd Secures Rs.23.13 Cr Order from SMS India Pvt. Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Simplex Castings Limited has received an order worth Rs.23.13 Crores from SMS India Pvt. Ltd. The order is for the supply of Coke Oven Doors, Door Frames, and Wall Protection Plates. The work is to be completed within 5 months from the issue of the work or purchase order. This order does not involve any related party transactions and there is no interest of the promoter/promoter group/group companies in SMS India Pvt. Ltd.

  • Simplex Castings Ltd has received an order worth Rs.23.13 Cr from SMS India Pvt. Ltd.
  • The order is for the supply of Coke Oven Doors, Door Frames, and Wall Protection Plates.
  • The work is to be completed within 5 months from the issue of the work or purchase order.
  • This order does not involve any related party transactions.
  • There is no interest of the promoter/promoter group/group companies in SMS India Pvt. Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIMPLEX CASTINGS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [VINTRON] Reganto Enterprises Ltd Approves Quarterly Results for Q3 and Q4 of 2025
item.description:
Reganto Enterprises Ltd, formerly known as Vintron Informatics Limited, held a Board meeting on March 20, 2026, to approve the unaudited quarterly financial results for the quarters ended on September 30, 2025, and December 31, 2025. The meeting was held at the registered office in New Delhi, India. The Board has approved the financial results and the Limited Review Report submitted by the Statutory Auditors. The company secretary, Chetan Sharma, has been authorized to file necessary returns, forms, and documents with the Stock Exchange(s) and other regulatory authorities.

  • Reganto Enterprises Ltd approved the unaudited quarterly financial results for Q3 and Q4 of 2025.
  • The approval was given during a Board meeting held on March 20, 2026.
  • The financial results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and placed before the Board.
  • Chetan Sharma, the company secretary, has been authorized to file necessary returns and documents with regulatory authorities.
  • The company, previously known as Vintron Informatics Limited, is registered in New Delhi, India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINTRON INFORMATICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
